component.name: VertexWrite
component.summary: Edit Markdown locally or over SSH/SFTP

description.p: VertexWrite is a lightweight GTK Markdown editor for opening, editing, previewing, and organizing documents wherever they live: local folders or remote servers over SSH/SFTP.
It focuses on fast startup, clean reading, live split preview, and a sidebar that browses local and remote file trees without becoming a full notes database.

ul.li: Local and SSH/SFTP file browsing through the sidebar

screenshot.caption: Split editor and live preview layout

description.p: Updated app store positioning, screenshots, shortcut documentation, and Flatpak metadata for the local and SSH/SFTP Markdown workflow.
Added upstream Linux install rules and updated Flatpak packaging to use generated Python dependency metadata.
Fixed Linux packaging builds on Ubuntu 22.04 Jammy.
